capabilities.summary: Expose a reviewed model identity without granting transport authority.
Expose a generation-bound paired child product identifier.
Scale a qualified RGB frame from zero through full intensity.
Deliver an explicit complete-device RGB black request.
Deliver a bounded application RGB frame through the receiver route.
Represent application lighting Off without claiming physical sleep.
Address qualified keyboard transport slots independently.
Carry streamed Direct-mode frames produced by an application effect engine.
Restore a retained stable Static or Off state after a trusted lifecycle event.
Retain and deliver one qualified static RGB state.
Derive availability dimensions from passive generation-bound evidence.
Permit one generation-bound structured writer session.
Create a new identity and session generation after receiver discovery.
Represent the receiver-backed wireless route independently from logical identity.
Describe a firmware-owned charging or status indicator without exposing RGB control.
Expose bounded battery percentage with age and unknown semantics.
Expose role-specific passive connection evidence without equating it with power state.
Expose passive mouse contact evidence as its own state dimension.
